details: Created NestJS project with TypeScript. Source in src/, build output in build/. Added scripts: build, start, start:dev, start:debug. Revert: delete all files and run npm init.

description: Set up Prisma for MySQL with introspective workflow
details: Installed Prisma + dotenv. Moved Prisma schema to database/ dir. Created schema.sql for DDL. Created PrismaService and global DatabaseModule. Added db:push, db:pull, db:generate, db:sync scripts. Revert: delete database/, src/database/, prisma.config.ts, remove prisma/@prisma/client/dotenv from package.json, remove db scripts.
Shell script that parses DATABASE_URL from .env, runs database/schema.sql against MySQL, then runs prisma db pull and prisma generate. Revert: delete db-sync.sh.

description: Moved database files from database/ to src/database/
details: Moved schema.prisma and schema.sql from root database/ into src/database/. Updated prisma.config.ts schema path to src/database/schema.prisma. Updated db-sync.sh and package.json db:push script to reference src/database/schema.sql. Fixed schema.prisma output path to ../generated/prisma. Revert: move files back to database/ and restore old paths in prisma.config.ts, db-sync.sh, package.json.

Created tables: user, harvest_category, harvest, harvest_image, chat_room, message. Includes all PKs, unique constraints (user.email), FKs, ENUM for user.type, and self-referencing FK on message.reply_to_id. Revert: replace schema.sql content with the original comment-only template.

description: Switch to prisma-client-js for node_modules output
details: Changed generator provider from prisma-client to prisma-client-js so client generates into node_modules/@prisma/client. Updated import to @prisma/client. Removed src/database/generated from .gitignore. Revert: change provider back to prisma-client with explicit output path.
